questions: If yes, is the dehydration some or severe? (Some/Severe)
Does the patient have PEM grade III? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have associated severe systemic infections (septicaemia, meningitis, pneumonia)? (Yes/No)
Are there frank blood and mucus in stool OR >10 pus cells/HPF? (Yes/No)
Is Giardiasis suspected (trophozoites seen on stool microscopy)? (Yes/No)
Does vomiting persist despite ORS in sips? (Yes/No)
